terminal.integrated.env.linux.PROMPT_COMMAND: if [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/devel/activate-aliases.sh" ]; then source "${workspaceFolder}/devel/activate-aliases.sh"; unset PROMPT_COMMAND; fi

terminal.integrated.env.osx.PROMPT_COMMAND: if [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/devel/activate-aliases.sh" ]; then source "${workspaceFolder}/devel/activate-aliases.sh"; unset PROMPT_COMMAND; fi
